# Roles & Responsibilities Matrix (Hybrid)

This hybrid matrix blends Waterfall governance with Agile delivery roles. In smaller programs, a
single person may cover multiple roles (for example, a Project Manager who also acts as a Business
Analyst or Product Owner during iterative phases). Tailor assignments and decision thresholds to
fit your delivery model.

| Role | Description | Key Responsibilities | Decision Authority | Escalation Path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Project Sponsor | Executive accountable for investment outcomes. | Approves charter, secures funding, resolves cross-functional conflicts, reinforces strategic alignment. | Approve major scope/budget changes and strategic pivots. | Escalate to steering committee or executive leadership. |
| Project Manager / Product Owner | Owns governance, plans, and value prioritization across phases. | Manages baselines, coordinates resources, owns backlog prioritization for Agile work, communicates status. | Approve day-to-day delivery trade-offs and backlog sequencing within constraints. | Escalate major risks or scope changes to Sponsor. |
| Scrum Master / Delivery Lead | Enables team delivery and Agile ceremonies within hybrid governance. | Facilitates ceremonies, removes impediments, ensures adherence to Agile practices, coordinates with PM. | Adjust team process and delivery cadence. | Escalate systemic impediments to PM/Sponsor. |
| Business Analyst / Team | Elicits requirements and supports iterative discovery. | Defines requirements and acceptance criteria, supports backlog refinement, validates deliverables. | Approve requirement baselines and clarifications. | Escalate requirement conflicts to PM/PO. |
| Functional Lead | Leads delivery within a functional or technical domain. | Assigns work, manages dependencies, ensures technical quality, contributes to estimation. | Approve technical designs within domain. | Escalate resource or design conflicts to PM. |
| Stakeholders | Business/technical partners engaged in governance and reviews. | Provide feedback, participate in demos and gate reviews, confirm outcomes and readiness. | Influence priorities and acceptance through feedback. | Escalate concerns to PM/PO or Sponsor. |

## Usage Notes
- Clarify which roles are shared across phase-gates and sprint cycles.
- Document combined role assignments in the charter or governance pack.
